arguments.content:
---
date: 2026-04-13
day: 21
week: Sprint 9 Week 2
document_type: Weekly Work Plan
author: Alex Zhang
---

# Weekly Work Plan: April 13 – 17, 2026

## Overview

**Sprint**: Sprint 9 (Week 2)  
**Focus**: Core feature implementation and testing  
**Team**: Backend Engineering (Alex, Bai)

---

## Monday, April 13

### Key Tasks
- [ ] Review Sprint 9 technical specification with team
- [ ] Set up WebSocket infrastructure for Real-Time Collaboration Engine
- [ ] Begin implementation of OT (Operational Transformation) core logic

### Expected Deliverables
- WebSocket server skeleton code
- Initial OT transformation functions
- Updated architecture diagram

---

## Tuesday, April 14

### Key Tasks
- [ ] Continue OT engine development
- [ ] Implement Redis pub/sub integration for multi-instance sync
- [ ] Code review with Bai on RBAC permission model

### Expected Deliverables
- Working OT engine with basic conflict resolution
- Redis adapter for WebSocket scaling
- RBAC database schema finalized

---

## Wednesday, April 15

### Key Tasks
- [ ] Implement RBAC middleware and permission checks
- [ ] Begin Workflow Engine rule parser development
- [ ] Write unit tests for OT engine

### Expected Deliverables
- RBAC middleware with requirePermission() function
- JSON rule parser for Workflow Engine
- Unit test suite for OT transformation logic (80%+ coverage)

---

## Thursday, April 16

### Key Tasks
- [ ] Integrate Workflow Engine with BullMQ job queue
- [ ] Implement action executor for notifications and webhooks
- [ ] Performance testing for WebSocket connections

### Expected Deliverables
- Working Workflow Engine with trigger/action execution
- BullMQ integration with retry logic
- Load test results for 1000 concurrent WebSocket connections

---

## Friday, April 17

### Key Tasks
- [ ] End-to-end integration testing for all three features
- [ ] Fix critical bugs identified during testing
- [ ] Sprint 9 Week 2 retrospective and documentation

### Expected Deliverables
- Integration test suite passing
- Bug fix PRs merged
- Week 2 summary report for PM
- Updated technical documentation

---

## Weekly Goals Summary

| Feature | Target Completion |
|---------|-------------------|
| Real-Time Collaboration Engine | 80% (core functionality) |
| Advanced Permissions & RBAC | 70% (middleware + API) |
| Automated Workflow Engine | 60% (rule engine + actions) |

## Risks & Blockers

| Risk | Mitigation |
|------|------------|
| WebSocket scaling issues | Load testing scheduled for Thursday |
| RBAC complexity | Daily check-ins with Chen (Frontend) on API contract |
| Workflow rule conflicts | Document edge cases, implement priority system |

---

*Plan created: 2026-04-13*  
*Next review: Daily standup at 09:30 CST*
